plugin_desc: Alcoma microwave transmission SNMP child template (enterprise PEN 12140). The verified profile is a clean baseline built on standard MIB-II and IF-MIB ifXTable; no stable vendor-specific row-filter-free CPU, memory, temperature, fan, power, radio or link-health gauges are confirmed from ALCOMA-MIB facts in this worktree. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate traffic while this plugin provides the Alcoma collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template. Supported brands/models — Alcoma microwave radio and wireless transmission devices.
name: Transmission

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
